jsonLd.title: Milton is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Milton are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Milton:
Milton is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton!
